top.contains: blue header bar with a small pink text label in the top-right corner, and a blue border edge.

bottom.contains: blue footer bar with a yellow horizontal bar along the bottom edge containing a text label, and a dark blue border edge.

left.contains: blue vertical bar with a pink text label oriented vertically, and a dark blue border edge.

right.contains: large, prominent vertical blue container panel that holds a white Prime logo with smile arrow.

frameAnalysis.corners: The vertical Prime logo (text 'prime' above the smile) is prominently placed within the blue panel in the right 25% of the frame. Vertical text branding is located in the top-left corner and a vertical text label is in the top-right corner.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main subject and title for the artwork within the central 70% of the art zone. Avoid the far-left and far-right fifths of the image, as this area will be overlaid by substantial branding panels, especially the large right panel. Ensure the bottom quarter of the composition is clear of critical detail.
